topStories.title: Trump attacks NATO allies as pressure mounts over Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Al Jazeera’s Alan Fisher explains what Trump’s latest criticism of US allies means.

topStories.title: PM Modi accuses Congress of “spreading panic and fear” during global crises
topStories.description: At a Gujarat rally, PM Modi says Congress spreads panic during crises, defends fuel price management and highlights  ₹20,000 crore development projects.

topStories.title: Fuel shock in US: These 20 states see the fastest gas price increase amid Hormuz crisis and war with Iran
topStories.description: The latest surge in prices reportedly mark the first time since 2023 that gas costs have crossed the $3 mark in all 50 states

topStories.title: Venezuela’s ‘Chavismo’ movement faces a crossroads after US attack
topStories.description: Hugo Chavez founded a movement opposed to US intervention. How have his supporters adapted to new US-Venezuela ties?

dailyNews.title: Despite War, Iran Will Play World Cup 2026 Matches In US, Says FIFA's Gianni Infantino
dailyNews.description: Infantino's statement comes after the Iranian football federation revealed earlier this month that it was "negotiating" with FIFA to move its group-stage games from the US to Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Why Iran believes it can outlast the US
dailyNews.description: Iran is preparing for deeper US escalation while insisting it’s winning. Can this war end before it widens?

dailyNews.title: Qatar says ‘ready to help’ with US-Iran negotiations
dailyNews.description: Qatari Foreign Ministry spokesperson Majed al-Ansari says Qatar is “ready to help” with US-Iran negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Iran war fallout: JetBlue Airways increases check-in bag fees as fuel prices go up - How other airlines are responding
dailyNews.description: The check-in baggage prices have been increased at least $4. During non-peak hours, JetBlue will charge $39 for the first bag on domestic, Caribbean, and Latin America routes. The price was earlier $35.

dailyNews.title: 'Not Going To...': Trump Hints At Ending Iran War, Says Hormuz Will Reopen Automatically
dailyNews.description: Trump's remark hinting at the Iran war timeline came hours after he asked the UK and other nations to 'get their own oil' and said that the US will not help them anymore.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court verdict on SC status for converts a BJP conspiracy: Sharmila
IRS' 15 April tax deadline nears: Here is a list of common mistakes to avoid while filing taxes
dailyNews.description: As the tax filing deadline gets close for US citizens, here's a list of common mistakes to avoid.

dailyNews.title: The attack on the right to protest in the UK is not just about Palestine
dailyNews.description: Patterns of politicised policing uncovered in a recent trial of pro-Palestinian activists should worry us all.

dailyNews.title: Iran will play World Cup games in US despite war, FIFA’s Infantino says
dailyNews.description: The chief of global football's governing body says US-Israeli war on Iran will not affect scheduling of  2026 World Cup.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court rejects Colorado's ban on LGBT ‘conversion talk’ therapy
dailyNews.description: The US Supreme Court on Tuesday (local time) rejected a Colorado law that prohibited psychotherapists from using ‘conversion’ talk therapy, aimed at changing a Lesbian Gay Bisexual Transgender (LGBT) minor's sexual orientation or identity, Reuters reported.

dailyNews.title: Don’t forgive Congress that treated Assam in step-motherly manner: Rajnath
dailyNews.description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh accused Congress of neglecting Assam and urged voters to reject them in the April 9 election, highlighting BJP's development efforts.

dailyNews.title: Jon Stewart mocks Donald Trump’s conduct, calls him ‘grandpa who’s lost his filter in public’
dailyNews.description: The Daily Show host Jon Stewart has criticised US President Donald Trump’s recent public conduct, comparing it to an unfiltered elderly relative rather than a wartime leader. His remarks come amid scrutiny of Trump’s messaging and leadership during an ongoing crisis.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day on positive thinking by Norman Vincent Peale: ‘Change your thoughts and you change your world’
dailyNews.description: This quote is personal. It tells us that we may not be able to control everything that happens around us, but we can control how we think about it. That is where it all starts.

dailyNews.title: King Charles and Queen Camilla's state visit to US to go ahead in April
dailyNews.description: Despite political tensions between the US and UK, the King will travel to Washington next month.

dailyNews.title: Wisconsin high school teacher charged with sexual assault of students, allegedly gave minors wine
dailyNews.description: A 22-year-old special ed teacher faces up to 40 years in prison after allegedly having sex with 16-year-old students and providing minors with alcohol.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Tiger Woods 'lives a life of pain' after DUI arrest as affidavit reveals pills found
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says Tiger Woods "lives a life of pain" after the golfer's DUI arrest in Jupiter Island, adding that the golfer "doesn’t have an alcohol problem."

dailyNews.title: WWE legend Stephanie McMahon slaps Cody Rhodes in return to 'Monday Night Raw'
dailyNews.description: With WrestleMania 42 nearly two weeks away, Stephanie McMahon appeared on "Monday Night RAW" to give a pep talk to Cody Rhodes ahead of his match with Randy Orton.

dailyNews.title: Former San Francisco Human Rights Commission leader accused of 'self-dealing,' public corruption
dailyNews.description: Sheryl Davis, former head of San Francisco's Dream Keeper Initiative, is accused of funneling over $4.5M in taxpayer funds to a nonprofit for personal gain.

dailyNews.title: Heart attack damage reversed with injectable RNA therapy, study finds
dailyNews.description: Columbia University scientists developed a two-step RNA therapy that may repair cardiovascular tissue after a heart attack by turning muscles into a "healing protein factory."

topStories.title: Profanity-fueled social media posts heat up Arkansas Republican runoff for secretary of state
topStories.description: Arkansas' GOP secretary of state runoff features an outsider vs. establishment clash, with Norris and Kim Hammer both touting support for Trump.

topStories.title: More key US allies block military flights as Iran war rift widens with Trump
topStories.description: President Donald Trump blasted France, Spain, Italy and the U.K. on Truth Social, criticizing their refusal to support U.S. military operations tied to the war with Iran.

topStories.title: SEE IT: Lawmakers caught on vacation amid record-breaking shutdown while DHS workers go unpaid
topStories.description: Lawmakers faced backlash for vacationing during the record 46-day shutdown while DHS workers went unpaid, while Trump called on Congress to cancel recess.

topStories.title: Trump admin eases asylum freeze for vetted migrants, keeps bans on ‘high-risk’ nations
topStories.description: DHS eases asylum holds for vetted migrants from non-high-risk nations while keeping strict bans on 39 countries, including Afghanistan and Somalia, under Trump.

topStories.title: Trump Faces a Decision on Whether to Start a Ground War in Iran
topStories.description: The president wants a negotiation, but the Iranians say they are refusing until a cease-fire is declared. And while Marines and the 82nd Airborne Division offer new leverage, the risks escalate quickly.

topStories.title: U.S. Gas Prices Hit $4 a Gallon on Average, a ‘Headache’ for Drivers and Trump
topStories.description: A month since the first U.S.-Israeli attacks and Iran’s response effectively shut off Persian Gulf oil, drivers are paying significantly more to fill up.

topStories.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
topStories.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.

topStories.title: The People Trump Pardoned Are on a Crime Spree
topStories.description: The president and the Republican Party deserve to pay a political price for the pardons.

dailyNews.title: Gas price rises as Trump mulls dropping bid to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump indicates he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as the war pushes U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Trump doubles down on harsh words about U.S. allies over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News' Weijia Jiang on Tuesday that the U.S. isn't withdrawing "quite yet" from the war with Iran, and urged U.S. allies to be more helpful with reopening the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Natalie Brand has more.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth backs Trump's criticism of U.S. allies over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said that the upcoming days of the Iran war "will be decisive," and reiterated President Trump's criticism of U.S. allies for not helping at the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Eleanor Watson has more.

dailyNews.title: Medicaid cuts threaten hundreds of hospitals, new report finds
dailyNews.description: More than 400 hospitals across the United States are at high risk of closing or cutting services because of the Medicaid cuts in President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” according to an analysis from the progressive watchdog group Public Citizen

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods had hydrocodone pills in pants after DUI rollover crash in Florida, police say
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump, whose former daughter-in-law Vanessa Trump is dating Woods, told The New York Post that Woods "lives a life of pain."

dailyNews.title: Army investigates helicopter flyby at Kid Rock's Nashville home
dailyNews.description: Kid Rock is a leading supporter of President Donald Trump, the subject of "No Kings" demonstrations around the U.S. on the day the helicopters showed up.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Trump thinks Strait will 'automatically open' when US leaves
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Florida Gov. DeSantis signs bill to rename Palm Beach airport after Trump
dailyNews.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis signed a bill Monday renaming Palm Beach International Airport to the President Donald J. Trump International Airport.
